problem id: 45dfb84f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  01001110 -> 00111011
  11011110 -> 01111111
  00101001 -> 10101110
  11000101 -> 00110111
  01011100 -> 01110111
  10111001 -> 11101110
  10101010 -> 10101010
  10011000 -> 01100110
  10011101 -> 01110111

query: 00000111
predicted answer: 00011101
